fields.Plan Name: State of Wisconsin and WPE Local: High Deductible Health Plan
fields.In-Network Generic RX: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible $5/prescription to out-of-pocket limit.
fields.In-Network Brand RX: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible 20% coinsurance ($50 max)
fields.In-Network Tier 3 RX: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible 40% coinsurance ($150 max)
fields.In-Network Tier 4 RX: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible $50
fields.In-Network Mail Order RX: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible $5/prescription to out-of-pocket limit. / 100% until deductible is met. After deductible 20% coinsurance ($50 max) / 100% until deductible is met. After deductible 40% coinsurance ($150 max) / 100% until deductible is met. After deductible $50
fields.Deductible Period: Each plan year beginning on January 1st
fields.Deductible Explanation: Combined medical and prescription drug deductible. Deductible exceptions include office visit copays and for federally required preventive services.
fields.In-Network RX: Level 1: Preferred generic drugs and certain lower cost preferred brand name drugs: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible $5/prescription to out-of-pocket limit. / Level 2: Preferred brand drugs and certain higher cost preferred generic drugs: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible 20% coinsurance ($50 max) / Level 3: Non-preferred brand name and certain high cost generic drugs: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible 40% coinsurance ($150 max) / Level 4: Specialty drugs at preferred specialty pharmacy provider: 100% until deductible is met. After deductible $50
